REPLY DEC OF SAMUEL KORNHAUSER IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF VERA, CARLOS ALBERTO RAMIREZ

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS UNCONTESTED. PLAINTIFF CARLOS VERA'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. (CCP 664.6.) THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WAS SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES AND INCLUDES AN INTEGRATION CLAUSE. (SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, 15.) DEFENDANT COUNSEL'S LETTER ENCLOSED WITH THE SIGNED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS NOT A PART OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT COUNSEL'S UNILATERAL ATTEMPT TO ADD A PROVISION REGARDING THE RESPONSIBILITY OF ALL LIENS IS IMPROPER. IF THERE WERE CONCERNS WITH ANY PROVISION OR OMISSION IN THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, DEFENDANTS SHOULD NOT HAVE SIGNED THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. THEREFORE, WITHIN 5 DAYS OF THIS ORDER, DEFENDANTS ELIZABETH L. THIERIOT AND JOSHUA DAVID HOROWITZ OR THEIR INSURER SHALL ISSUE A CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 29,000.00 MADE PAYABLE TO "SAMUEL KORNHAUSER AND CARLOS RAMIREZ VERA." FURTHERMORE, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS FOR BRINGING THIS MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT. (SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, 12.) DEFENDANTS ELIZABETH L. THIERIOT AND JOSHUA DAVID HOROWITZ OR THEIR INSURER SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 1,960.00 TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-11-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2014 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2014 Continued To May-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Samuel Kornhauser, Esq. of the Law Office of Samuel Kornhauser, Tel. 415.981.6281, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. PLAINTIFF CARLOS VERA'S Motion To Enforce Settlement is Granted. (CCP 664.6.) The Settlement Agreement was signed by all parties and includes an integration clause. (Settlement Agreement, 15.) Defendant counsel's letter enclosed with the signed Settlement Agreement is not a part of the Settlement Agreement. Defendant counsel's unilateral attempt to add a provision regarding the responsibility of all liens is improper. If there were concerns with any provision or omission in the Settlement Agreement, Defendants should not have signed the Settlement Agreement. Therefore, within 5 days of this order, Defendants Elizabeth L. Thieriot and Joshua David Horowitz or their insurer shall issue a check in the amount of $ 29,000.00 made payable to "Samuel Kornhauser and Carlos Ramirez Vera." Furthermore, Plaintiff is entitled to reasonable attorney fees and costs for bringing this Motion to Enforce Settlement. (Settlement Agreement, 12.) Defendants Elizabeth L. Thieriot and Joshua David Horowitz or their insurer shall pay Plaintiff's attorney fees and costs in the amount of $ 1,960.00 to be paid within 30 days of service of this order. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2014 Continued To Mar-25-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Continued To Jan-28-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Samuel Kornhauser, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Jan-28-2014 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. Judge Cynthia Lee presiding. Proceedings not reported. (610)
